pageContext.name: Barnaby Brooks Jr.
pageContext.description: Tiger & Bunny return after 11 years with a new season available exclusively on Netflix. To celebrate, Tamashii Nations is bringing the S.H.Figuarts Barnaby Brooks Jr. Style 3 from Tiger & Bunny 2!   This figure stands at 6.3' tall and includes optional hand parts, along with optional head parts, allowing the figure to be displayed without its masks.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
